22 Jul 2026, 07:00-16:30 EST

🔥 Top Stories
• Trump escalates Iran threat — warns strikes on bridges/power plants if Hormuz shipping is hit; oil, gas, gold surge and risk assets slip
• Q2 big-tech/EV earnings whipsaw markets — Alphabet beats on revenue/cloud, Tesla beats top line but margins miss; AI capex stays in focus

⛽ Oil & Energy
• EIA crude +2.01M vs est -1.95M; gasoline/diesel also build, but Brent/$WTI still jump on Middle East supply risk

📊 Markets & Macro
• US stocks end mixed — Dow flat/up, S&P slightly down, Nasdaq softer as traders balance AI optimism vs geopolitical risk
• Treasury auction weakens — 20Y bonds tailed with softer bid-to-cover; yields stay elevated
• Mortgage rates tick up — MBA 30Y rate at 6.69%, applications rebound modestly

🌍 Geopolitical
• US-Iran standoff intensifies — Trump and Iranian officials trade fresh threats; heavy-bomber escalation reports and shipping warnings deepen regional risk
• Middle East security alerts — Bahrain/Dammam scare clears; Israel/Lebanon and Red Sea attacks keep flashpoints active
• Russia/Ukraine, China/India talks — Trump-Zelensky call supports peace push; Beijing says ties with India remain constructive

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Crypto Clarity Act advances but faces hurdles — Senate GOP releases new draft/ethics rules; odds of passage slump to 39%
• SEC tightens tone — Peirce warns against stretching securities law; Zilliqa halts transactions after ledger bug
• Coinbase, Ethereum sentiment firm — Armstrong backs full Senate vote; tokenized ETH ETF inflows stay strong

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• US hardens China tech stance — Senate committee passes tighter Chinese vehicle rules; agency moves to bar devices with risky Chinese components
• Trade agenda stays active — USTR Greer pushes USMCA, ag/mineral supply chains and tariff leverage in talks with Canada, Mexico, China
• Tax/ethics scrutiny rises — Bessent flags Wall Street tax products; House moves on insider-trading ban for Congress

🏢 Corporate
• Alphabet/Tesla headline mega-cap earnings — GOOGL beats on cloud and ad revenue; TSLA revenue tops but margins/FY earnings disappoint
• IBM, TI, ServiceNow, Southwest beat-or-tighten — solid prints support software/industrial cyclicals despite cautious outlooks
• M&A/data-center wave — Paramount-WBD gets EU nod, Nestlé nears Perrier sale, OpenAI/Apple/Amazon expand AI/data-center capex
